formalization_risks: Need to handle both lower-triangular and upper-triangular cases, possibly via transpose.

missing_or_uncertain_context: Exact Mathlib lemma for determinant of triangular matrix

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: det_triangular : det A = ∏ i, A i i for triangular A

needed_project_context.name: AlgebraicCombinatorics.Det.det_transpose'
needed_project_context.why_needed: To reduce upper-triangular to lower-triangular via transpose

planned_declarations.target_statement_sketch: For any n, any triangular matrix A over K, det A equals product of diagonal entries.

units.source_focus_summary: Determinant of triangular matrix equals product of diagonal entries.
